title: 销量达成分析
description: 本月销量目标达成情况及未达成原因的多维分解

kpis.label: 整体达成率
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(d.deliv_qty_mt)*100.0/NULLIF(SUM(p.rllng_planqty_mt),0),1) as v FROM sales_delivery d LEFT JOIN rolling_plan p ON d.brnch_code=p.brnch_code AND d.busline_code=p.busline_code AND strftime('%Y%m', d.deliv_crt_time)=p.stats_yearmth WHERE strftime('%Y%m', d.deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND d.deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL
kpis.help: 本月实际提货量/滚动计划量

kpis.label: 实际提货量（吨）
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as v FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL

kpis.label: 计划量（吨）
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(rllng_planqty_mt),1) as v FROM rolling_plan WHERE stats_yearmth='202603'

kpis.label: 缺口量（吨）
kpis.sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(p.rllng_planqty_mt)-COALESCE(SUM(d.deliv_qty_mt),0),1) as v FROM rolling_plan p LEFT JOIN sales_delivery d ON d.brnch_code=p.brnch_code AND d.busline_code=p.busline_code AND strftime('%Y%m', d.deliv_crt_time)=p.stats_yearmth AND d.deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL WHERE p.stats_yearmth='202603'
kpis.help: 计划量与实际量的差值

stages.title: 分公司达成
stages.description: 各分公司达成率与缺口量对比
stages.sql: SELECT d.brnch_descrptn as 分公司, ROUND(SUM(d.deliv_qty_mt),1) as 实际量_吨, ROUND(SUM(p.rllng_planqty_mt),1) as 计划量_吨, ROUND(SUM(d.deliv_qty_mt)*100.0/NULLIF(SUM(p.rllng_planqty_mt),0),1) as 达成率_pct FROM sales_delivery d LEFT JOIN rolling_plan p ON d.brnch_code=p.brnch_code AND d.busline_code=p.busline_code AND strftime('%Y%m', d.deliv_crt_time)=p.stats_yearmth WHERE strftime('%Y%m', d.deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND d.deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY d.brnch_descrptn ORDER BY 达成率_pct ASC
stages.insight_focus: 哪些分公司达成率最低？缺口最大？

stages.title: 产线缺口
stages.description: 按产线拆解达成缺口，识别短板产线
stages.sql: SELECT d.deliv_prodctnline_descrptn as 产线, ROUND(SUM(d.deliv_qty_mt),1) as 实际量_吨, ROUND(SUM(d.deliv_qty_mt)*100.0/NULLIF(SUM(p.rllng_planqty_mt),0),1) as 达成率_pct FROM sales_delivery d LEFT JOIN rolling_plan p ON d.brnch_code=p.brnch_code AND d.busline_code=p.busline_code AND strftime('%Y%m', d.deliv_crt_time)=p.stats_yearmth WHERE strftime('%Y%m', d.deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND d.deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY d.deliv_prodctnline_descrptn ORDER BY 达成率_pct ASC
stages.insight_focus: 哪条产线达成率最差？是需求问题还是供给问题？

stages.title: 渠道结构
stages.description: 各销售渠道的提货量占比
stages.sql: SELECT deliv_distri_chnl_descrptn as 渠道, ROUND(SUM(deliv_qty_mt),1) as 提货量_吨, ROUND(100.0*SUM(deliv_qty_mt)/NULLIF((SELECT SUM(deliv_qty_mt) FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL),0),1) as 占比_pct FROM sales_delivery WHERE strftime('%Y%m', deliv_crt_time)='202603' AND deliv_retrngds_identfctn IS NULL GROUP BY deliv_distri_chnl_descrptn ORDER BY 提货量_吨 DESC
stages.insight_focus: 渠道结构是否合理？电商/商超/流通占比变化？

stages.title: 订单倒挂
stages.description: 有订单但尚未发货的积压情况
stages.sql: SELECT order_prodctnline_descrptn as 产线, COUNT(*) as 倒挂订单数, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN order_dlvry_sts_code!='C' THEN order_qty_mt ELSE 0 END),1) as 未交货量_吨, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN order_dlvry_sts_code='A' THEN order_qty_mt ELSE 0 END),1) as 未开始交货_吨 FROM sales_order WHERE strftime('%Y%m', order_crt_date)='202603' AND order_dlvry_sts_code!='C' GROUP BY order_prodctnline_descrptn ORDER BY 未交货量_吨 DESC
stages.insight_focus: 订单积压集中在哪个产线？未开始交货的比例有多高？

summary_prompt: 根据以上销量达成分析数据（分公司达成、产线缺口、渠道结构、订单倒挂），请以区域销售管理层视角总结：1)本月主要问题，2)关键缺口数字，3)最紧迫的2个行动项。不超过150字。
